# Mississippi Canyon

**Summary**: A region in the Gulf of Mexico known for complex geology due to salt tectonics.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021]] studied a reservoir in the mississippi-canyon area.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021]] offshore Gulf of Mexico

## Formations Present

- [[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021]] not specified

## Key Findings From This Location

- The rock was a weakly consolidated sand with high porosity (12-25%). ([[2021-suleymanov|Suleymanov, 2021, p. 71]])
